structure_flags.label: Proposal core / §5
structure_flags.one_line: No literature checklist, related-work citations, or relevance commentary was supplied.

novelty_flags.label: Proposal core
novelty_flags.one_line: The core supplies no flagship statement and zero prior-art candidates, so neither novelty axis can be evaluated.

soundness_flags.label: Proposal core
soundness_flags.one_line: The supplied artifact is a needs-pivot status record, not a proposal core: it defines no formal setup, assumptions, construction, or to-prove statement.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Pivot to a surviving, structurally distinct seed and write a typed core with one concrete focal construction and at least one to-prove statement.
Reconstruct a literature checklist with at least three anchored published comparators before asserting a novelty gap.

recommended_next_step: Pivot at Stage -1; no research kernel exists to advance to Stage 0.
